title: Captain Underpants and the Preposterous Plight of the Purple Potty People
titleZh: 内裤队长与紫色马桶人的离奇困境
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: George and Harold meet their evil twins in a backwards dimension!

q.en: What machine do George and Harold use to travel to another dimension?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德用什么机器穿越到了另一个维度？

explain.en: Melvin built a time machine out of a Purple Potty. When George and Harold used it two days in a row, it sent them into a backwards alternate universe.
explain.zh: 梅尔文用一只紫色马桶改造成时光机。乔治和哈罗德连续两天使用它，结果被送进了一个颠倒的平行宇宙。

q.en: What rule about the Purple Potty did Melvin warn them never to break?
q.zh: 关于紫色马桶，梅尔文警告他们绝不能违反哪条规则？

options.en: Never use it two days in a row
options.zh: 绝不能连续两天使用它
每次旅行都必须带上宠物

explain.en: Melvin's rule was 'Don't use it 2 days in a Row.' George and Harold ignored it, and something very bad happened.
explain.zh: 梅尔文的规则是“绝不能连续两天使用”。乔治和哈罗德没听，结果闯下了大祸。

q.en: In the backwards universe, how is Mr. Krupp different from the real one?
q.zh: 在颠倒的宇宙里，克拉普先生和现实中的他有什么不同？

explain.en: In the alternate world everything is reversed, so the normally mean Principal Krupp is actually nice and pleasant to the boys.
explain.zh: 在那个平行世界里一切都反了过来，所以平时刻薄的克拉普校长变得对孩子们和善又亲切。

q.en: What are the names and kinds of George and Harold's two pets?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德的两只宠物分别叫什么、是什么？

options.en: Crackers the pterodactyl and Sulu the robotic hamster
options.zh: 翼龙“脆脆”和机器仓鼠“苏鲁”

options.en: Fluffy the cat and Rex the dog
options.zh: 猫咪“毛毛”和狗狗“雷克斯”

options.en: Tweetie the bird and Spike the lizard
Sulu the pterodactyl and Crackers the hamster

explain.en: In their last adventure George and Harold got a pterodactyl named Crackers and a bionic (robotic) hamster named Sulu.
explain.zh: 在上一个故事里，乔治和哈罗德得到了一只叫“脆脆”的翼龙，还有一只叫“苏鲁”的生物（机器）仓鼠。

q.en: In the comic the evil twins create, what evil hero do they make Mr. Krupp become?
q.zh: 在邪恶双胞胎创作的漫画里，他们让克拉普先生变成了哪个邪恶英雄？

explain.en: The evil twins' comic is 'The Preposterous Plight of Captain Blunderpants,' where the boys hypnotize a nice Mr. Krupp into the villain Captain Blunderpants.
explain.zh: 邪恶双胞胎的漫画名叫《笨裤队长的离奇困境》，里面两个男孩把和善的克拉普先生催眠成了反派“笨裤队长”。

q.en: In the comic, how does Captain Blunderpants gain his amazing super powers?
q.zh: 在漫画里，笨裤队长是怎么获得惊人超能力的？

options.en: A chemical reaction of chocolate, peanut butter, and extra cheese
options.zh: 巧克力、花生酱和额外芝士发生了化学反应

explain.en: The strange mix of chocolate, peanut butter, and extra cheese created a super-powerful chemical reaction that gave Captain Blunderpants amazing powers.
explain.zh: 巧克力、花生酱和额外芝士混在一起，产生了一场超级厉害的化学反应，让笨裤队长获得了惊人力量。

q.en: Which pet swoops in to rescue George and Harold from their hypnotized pets?
q.zh: 哪只宠物俯冲下来，把乔治和哈罗德从被催眠的宠物手中救走？

explain.en: The evil twins hypnotized Sulu to attack, but Crackers the pterodactyl grabbed George and Harold and flew them to safety.
explain.zh: 邪恶双胞胎催眠了苏鲁让它发动攻击，但翼龙脆脆一把抓住乔治和哈罗德，把他们救到了安全的地方。

q.en: In Chapter 15 'Super Supper,' what special day is being celebrated?
q.zh: 在第15章《超级晚餐》里，大家在庆祝什么特别的日子？

explain.en: It is Grandparents Day, and the families gather for a big dinner where George and Harold's grandparents read the comic the boys made them.
explain.zh: 那天是祖父母日，全家一起吃大餐，乔治和哈罗德的祖父母读起了两个男孩为他们画的漫画。

q.en: What comic do George and Harold make for their grandparents?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德为祖父母画了哪本漫画？

options.en: The Adventures of Boxer Boy and Great-Granny Girdle
options.zh: 《拳击男孩与紧身裤老奶奶的冒险》

options.en: FrankenFart vs. the Bionic Barf Burnies
options.zh: 《 Frankenstein 屁 vs. 生物呕吐怪》

explain.en: They made 'The Adventures of Boxer Boy and Great-Granny Girdle,' a story where their grandparents become superheroes who fight Robo-Geezers.
explain.zh: 他们画了《拳击男孩与紧身裤老奶奶的冒险》，讲的是祖父母变成超级英雄，对抗机器老人的故事。

q.en: In the real world, what happens when water is splashed on Nice Mr. Krupp's face?
q.zh: 在现实世界里，往和善的克拉普先生脸上泼水会发生什么？

options.en: He turns back into Principal Krupp
He turns into the evil Captain Blunderpants
options.zh: 他变成了邪恶的笨裤队长

explain.en: The evil George splashed water on Nice Mr. Krupp, and he ripped off his clothes and declared, 'I AM CAPTAIN BLUNDERPANTS!'
explain.zh: 邪恶的乔治往和善的克拉普先生脸上泼了水，他扯掉衣服大喊：“我就是笨裤队长！”
